name: /import-eslint-config writes a profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml draft file with the mapping results
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error"}}\n' > .eslintrc && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/import-eslint-config.sh" .eslintrc --mapping-stub direct-match --out profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml 2>err.txt && [ -f profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml ] && grep -q 'no-eval' profiles/imported-from-eslint.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
